title: Boundary trace of positive solutions of semilinear elliptic equations in   Lipschitz domains
summary:
We study the generalized boundary value problem for nonnegative solutions of
$-\Delta u+g(u)=0$ in a bounded Lipschitz domain $\Gw$, when $g$ is continuous
and nondecreasing. Using the harmonic measure of $\Gw$, we define a trace in
the class of outer regular Borel measures. We amphasize the case where
$g(u)=|u|^{q-1}u$, $q>1$. When $\Gw$ is (locally) a cone with vertex $y$, we
prove sharp results of removability and characterization of singular behavior.
In the general case, assuming that $\Gw$ possesses a tangent cone at every
boundary point and $q$ is subcritical, we prove an existence and uniqueness
result for positive solutions with arbitrary boundary trace. We obtain sharp
results involving Besov spaces with negative index on k-dimensional edges and
apply our results to the characterization of removable sets and good measures
on the boundary of a polyhedron.

title: Some elliptic PDEs on Riemannian manifolds with boundary
summary:
The goal of this paper is to investigate some rigidity properties of stable
solutions of elliptic equations set on manifolds with boundary.
  We provide several types of results, according to the dimension of the
manifold and the sign of its Ricci curvature.

title: Optical tomography: forward and inverse problems
summary:
This paper is a review of recent mathematical and computational advances in
optical tomography. We discuss the physical foundations of forward models for
light propagation on microscopic, mesoscopic and macroscopic scales. We also
consider direct and numerical approaches to the inverse problems that arise at
each of these scales. Finally, we outline future directions and open problems
in the field.
